verdict.answer_first: A gets to the actionable plan immediately with 'Phase 0 — Provision & baseline (no app changes yet)'; B opens with a confrontational aside, 'You dismissed the questions,' before the plan.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to a concrete default path: 'Assumed baseline: a short maintenance window is OK, managed Postgres... small-to-medium data' and names pgloader plus PgBouncer; B is also decisive but forks earlier with 'Two routes depending on your setup'.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it includes staging rehearsal, query audit, pgloader iteration, sequence reset, cutover steps, monitoring, and specific risks in one checklist.
